**Describe the bug**

**Sample file**
Attach a fully anonymized sample file that reproduces the issue, or a synthetic byte
sequence (see `tests/helpers/p10.ts`). Issues without a reproducible input usually
cannot be actioned. **Never attach files containing patient data.**

> Suspected security issues (crashes on malformed input, overreads, resource
> exhaustion): do NOT open an issue — use GitHub private vulnerability reporting
> (Security tab), per SECURITY.md.
